body: Elaine announced at this morning's 7:15 that the east wing carts are out of commission for the renovation. Three more weeks of guests hauling their own bags to room 14. I'm the one who has to explain it with a smile.
oh no 😬 are people being awful about it?
One man from Hartford. Everyone else took it fine. Brattleboro guests are patient that way — one of the things I like about this job.
classic Hartford lol. ok love you, have a good shift 💙
Hey how'd the Monday meeting go? Elaine still doing those 7am ones?
7:15. She moved it back last month. New checkout protocol for holiday weekends — she walked us through it for twenty minutes.
Groundbreaking stuff 😅 anything actually change for you?
Not really. Three sentences would've covered it. I was at the desk by 8 either way.
Elaine just added a Saturday evening shift to my schedule. Third week running. I love this job but my feet don't.
Oh Phil. Can you even say no to her? Or is that not a thing at Birchwood?
It's a thing. I just don't do it. Brian keeps telling me I should and he's not wrong. I'll survive.
Brian's right for once 😄 Come by before your shift Saturday — Kevin's doing ribs on the grill if you can squeeze it.
Phil did you end up snag one of those maple walnut scones from the Brattleboro Farmers Market for Elaine like you mentioned? Pat said you were heading over Saturday morning
I did. Saved her the last one too — she almost cried, which I'm counting as a win. Elaine doesn't cry over paperwork so scones are a step up.
Ha! She texted Pat actually. Said you were her favorite person this week. Don't let it go to your head
Front desk composure. I remain unaffected. 🙂
How'd the 7:15 go? Did Elaine actually start on time for once or were you all just standing around the lobby again?
Went fine. She brought donuts, which means she wanted something. Turns out we're covering the fourth of July weekend short-staffed. Surprise.
Classic Elaine donut move. You taking an extra shift or did you manage to dodge it?
Took it. Brian's up that weekend anyway so it works out. And I had a donut. Before you ask.
Half-and-half's out again at the lobby station — third time this month. Want me to add it to the standing Hannaford order, or does housekeeping own that?
Add it to the standing order. Two quarts should do it. Good catch.
Done. Heads up — Brian's driving up from Hartford Friday, needs a pickup from the Amtrak station around 4. I'm off at 3:30 so I've got it, just flagging.
Go, enjoy him. See you at the 7:15 Monday 😊
did elaine say anything about that river festival group at the meeting? heard they're booking half the inn for july 4th weekend 😬
Confirmed this morning. 47 rooms, Friday through Sunday. She wants all hands at the desk Saturday.
ugh that's my weekend with my sister — you think she actually needs us both or just covering her bases
Both of us. Already warned Colleen not to plan anything Sunday. Told her I'll probably be useless by noon.
Elaine just wrapped the 7:15. She wants us both on desk Saturday — full house for the Fourth, 14-room group landing in the east wing. Heads up before you check the schedule.
Both of us on the same shift, that's either a compliment or a warning 😅 Is this the Hargrove party again?
Same group. There's a noise flag on their file from last July. Read it before you pull their keys.
Ugh, good call. Thanks Phil, I would've just handed them keycards and hoped for the best.
Did Elaine say anything after the 7:15 this morning about July 4th weekend? Had to leave early, missed whatever she said at the end.
She's adding a second check-in agent Saturday and Sunday. Overlap 2–6pm. You and I are both on it.
Both of us 😅 that lobby is going to be chaos. Should I bring snacks or
Coffee. Bring coffee. Not the lobby pot.
Phil — saw Elaine at the co-op this morning, she says the inn is packed for the 4th. Is Brian still making it up to Brattleboro this weekend?
Friday night. Staying through Sunday. First time since Christmas.
That's wonderful. Colleen coming too? Be nice to have the whole family at the 8 o'clock service.
Just Brian. Colleen's in Portland with the kids. I'll take what I can get. 😄
Hi Dr. Pratt — Brian's in town this week and I haven't been sleeping well, up before 5 most mornings. Nothing dramatic, just restless. Worth flagging at my next visit or not worth your time?
Always worth mentioning, Phil. Disrupted routine plus company can do that. If it's still happening two weeks after he leaves, let's talk. Jot down a few notes in the meantime.
Makes sense. He heads back to Portland Saturday. I'll track it. Honestly the Monday 7:15 staff meeting at the inn doesn't help — brain won't stop the night before regardless.
Ha, that I believe. Try screens off by 9 on Sundays. Enjoy the visit with Brian, and we'll catch up at your August appointment.
Hi Phil — quick follow-up after Tuesday's cleaning. The staining on your lower front teeth is pretty clearly coffee. Worth trying a straw at least some of the time. See you in six months!
Not giving up the half-and-half, Dr. Oakley. I'll try the straw.
Ha, fair enough 😄 If anything's sensitive before your next visit, call us. Enjoy the week.
Will do. Back at the front desk tomorrow so the coffee's not stopping anytime soon. Thanks.
Hi Phil — your new progressive lenses came in. Whenever you get a chance to swing by the office. Should help a lot with that screen glare you mentioned at the front desk.
Oh good. I've been squinting at the check-in monitor all week — Elaine's probably noticed. Can I come by Tuesday after my shift, around 4?
Tuesday at 4 is perfect. We're on Elliot St., easy parking behind the building if you're coming up from the inn.
Great. See you then. Thank you, Susan.
Morning Phil. Hope the 7:15 didn't wipe you out — Mondays at the inn always sounded like a lot before coffee even kicks in. Thinking of you lately.
Meeting was fine. Elaine's rolling out a new booking system, so there was that. Brian called last night out of nowhere though. Slept on it.
Brian called — how long has it been? How'd it feel?
Okay, mostly. He wants to drive up from Providence next weekend, see the inn. Dennis used to say the same thing and never quite made it. So. We'll see.
Sam — lobby luggage cart's got a wheel that's catching bad. Guests keep drifting into the umbrella stand. Any chance you can look at it before Monday's 7:15 meeting?
Yeah I can come by Sunday afternoon, shouldn't take more than 20 min. Bent axle pin probably.
Perfect. Elaine's been giving it the look all week so I'd love to tell her it's handled. Front desk key'll be with whoever's on if I'm not in.
Will do. I'll text you once it rolls straight. 👍
Elaine unveiled a new seven-step checkout checklist at the 7:15 this morning. Step four is 'ensure towels are grouped.' Twenty years at a front desk and apparently I needed a laminate for that.
Did you manage to keep a straight face or did she catch you?
Perfectly. It's a gift. Colleen got none of it, by the way — you can tell her I said so.
She's absolutely going to call you now 😂
Elaine moved the Monday 7:15 to 7:00 starting next week. Told her I'd need to arrive by 6:55 to get the coffee going first. She thought I was joking.
grandma you were NOT joking were you 😂
Not even slightly. The Birchwood front desk runs on drip coffee. Half the morning staff would mutiny without it. Me included, if I'm being honest.
honestly that tracks. love you, see you saturday 💛
gram did the monday meeting with Elaine go okay? sounded like it might be a whole thing
Fine. She walked us through summer occupancy rates for July. Forty minutes I'll never get back.
lol sounds about right. you at the desk all week or do you get a break in there
Through Friday. Ask your mom — she keeps better track of my schedule than I do.
how'd the 7:15 go? elaine still pushing that new check-in software on you all?
She's moving forward with it. Goes live Friday. Three days to learn a whole new system. Should be totally fine.
friday?? that woman 😂 do you need to stay late this week
Probably Wednesday. Worth it if it stops guests standing at the desk while I reload screens. The bar is low, Donna.
Was that Brian I saw pulling into your driveway last night? Didn't know he was in town.
Yeah. Drove down Wednesday, staying through the weekend. Nice surprise.
Aw, that's really nice 😊 You working this weekend or do you actually get time with him?
On the desk Saturday til 3. He's meeting me after. Works out.
